description: Strip the idea to its root friction - what pain exists that this specifically removes and why does it matter now
Ask why five times on "why build this" to expose the real driver underneath the stated one - powerful for taglines that actually land
output_pattern: surface driver → deeper driver → root motivation

description: Pick one concrete user and walk through their week with vs without this tool - surfaces audience specificity and validates the value claim
Draft three one-sentence taglines with different emphases then delete the two that don't survive cutting - forces the tagline to earn its words
Name the stack choice and the tradeoffs being accepted - exposes undecideds and prevents resume-driven architecture
For each stated claim ask "what assumption is this resting on" - useful when the idea feels too polished too early
What's the thinnest possible v1 that proves the core claim - everything else goes to explicit Out
Name three tempting features we are NOT building and why - the explicit list prevents scope creep more than the in-list does
Specify the command observation or ship moment that tells you v1 works - make it runnable or measurable not aspirational
Enumerate concrete tasks an AI agent will own in this repo - write features open PRs run evals ship releases triage issues
For each agent task name what cultivate must encode (AGENTS.md sections CI feedback loops lint rules plan workflow) - bridges plot to cultivate
It is six months in and the project died - write the autopsy then work backward to today's preventions
Surface hard constraints - timeline team size hard dependencies existing systems that cannot change
What existing projects cover similar ground and how is this 10x different - positioning without this is fragile
What do users of similar tools complain about - their frustrations are your openings
